everyone's talking bout sunsets in boracay and siquijor, but norte's sunset is too personal for me. even though im in awe of sunsets in other places, this one feels home to me :) naalala ko dati, pag kulay kahel na ang langit, sisimulan na ng ng inang ko magsaing at sasabayan ng uncle ko magluto. habang ako, sisilip sa labas, ilang sandali nalang, magsasara na rin ng tindahan sila tita. para sa paglubog ng araw, pag tapos na lahat ng trabaho, at luto na din ang sinaing, sabay sabay maghahapunan :) kayo ba? instead of asking where the best sunset is, saang sunset yung may kwento para sainyo? in loving memory of my inang, happy one year in heaven :) #sunset #philippinessunset #philippines #cinematictravel #cinematicvideo

“We met at a party through friends. Everyone else was drinking and dancing, but we just sat in the corner, talking for hours. Eight months later, I got a European train pass and asked her to come travel with me. We camped wherever we could, sleeping in the wild bushes of Germany, a stranger’s garden in Belgium, and waking up to the sunrise by the sea in Italy. Traveling like that is a true test. There are hard moments when you're hungry, tired, and have nowhere to sleep, but you completely forget those parts when you're with the right person. Now we’re trying to figure out what comes next. I want to study abroad in Denmark, and Zsuzsi wants to stay in Hungary. It feels like an impossible choice between love and the life you imagined. We don't know yet how it works out, but we have a few more months to figure it out.” — Zoárd & Zsuzsi Budapest, Hungary Life on Film #lifeonfilm
